data.title: U.S. Implements Tariffs on Imported Pharmaceuticals
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the United States has addressed inflation and seen a rise in the stock market. The country will impose tariffs on imported pharmaceuticals, with tariffs being the only requirement.

data.title: A whale deposited 8,922 ETH to Kraken in the past hour
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, whales are selling ETH. A whale (0xc19D) deposited 8,922 ETH worth 14.82 million US dollars to Kraken in the past hour; and another whale (0x4e7a) sold 8,001 ETH worth 13.06 million US dollars in the past hour.

data.title: Binance: The platform has resumed ZEC withdrawals
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Binance Customer Support’s post on the X platform, the Binance platform has resumed ZEC withdrawals. Binance has been working closely with relevant teams to resolve the ZEC wallet issue, which has been resolved.

data.title: LIVE: President Trump welcomes President Bukele to the White House.
Chinese court sentences nine for defrauding 66,800 Indians in $6M crypto telecom scams
data.description:
The People’s Court of Heze Economic Development Zone in Shandong Province, presided by Judge Liu Xilei, has cracked down on a $6. 2M USDT fraud ring that targeted around 66,800 Indians. The court also sentenced nine Chinese fraudsters to prison terms ranging from five to fourteen years.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinese-court-on-6m-crypto-scams/

data.title: Goldman Sachs’ Profits Jump By 15% With Equity And Fixed Income Gains
data.description:
Catenaa, Monday, April 14, 2025- Goldman Sachs’ first quarter profits rose by 15% year on year, the company reported on Monday, driven by record revenues by equities and fixed income amidst volatility. The firm reported net revenues of $15. 06 billion and net earnings of $4. 74 billion for the first quarter ended March, while diluted earnings […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/goldman-sachs-profits-jump-by-15-with-equity-and-fixed-income-gains

data.title: OKX Accuses Mantra of Making Major Changes to Tokenomics
data.description:
TL;DR Mantra’s OM token lost over 90% of its value within an hour, wiping out $5. 5 billion in market capitalization after a suspicious transfer to OKX. Coordinated movements from at least 17 wallets were detected before the crash, alongside recent changes in the token’s economic model. Although OM rebounded 200% after the drop, experts warned. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/okx-accuses-mantra-of-making-major-changes-to-tokenomics/

data.title: The IMF goes after Donald Trump, warns he is triggering global recession
data.description:
The International Monetary Fund is warning countries about an impending global recession, citing US President Donald Trump’s tariff strategy and geopolitical indifferences as factors that could destabilize global financial markets. In a report released Monday, the IMF cautioned that escalations in geopolitical risk, especially related to trade conflicts, could lead to major and lasting corrections […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/imf-goes-after-trump-for-global-recession/

data.title: Hong Kong Stock Exchange Explores Blockchain for Carbon Credit Transparency
data.description: According to Odaily, Zhou Guanying, the Chief Sustainability Officer of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange Group, has expressed that the application of new technologies like blockchain could enhance the transparency and efficiency of carbon credit tracking. This advancement may also facilitate cross-border transactions. Consequently, the Hong Kong Stock Exchange is open to utilizing blockchain and similar technologies to address current issues in the carbon market.
